page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Clustering without alignment using (locality sensitive hashing) LSH and MinHashing of barcoded reads
page_metadata.biotools__summary: This package contains functions for normalizing spotted microarray data, based on a physically motivated calibration model. The model parameters and error distributions are estimated from external control spikes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This package contains functions for normalizing spotted microarray data, based on a physically motivated calibration model. The model parameters and error distributions are estimated from external control spikes.
